title: Products
description: Create, review, and manage merchant-scoped catalog products.

created.title: Product created
created.description: The product was created and is now available in this merchant catalog.

updated.title: Product updated
updated.description: The product changes were saved and the catalog list has been refreshed.

detail.shellDescription: Review merchant-scoped product details and update storefront product data.
detail.optionsLoadErrorTitle: Product options could not be loaded
detail.optionsLoadErrorDesc: Could not load {labels}. Editing is disabled until reference data loads to avoid clearing existing relationships.
detail.loadingOptionsDesc: Categories and collections are loading. You can still enter product details.
detail.deleteDesc: “{title}” will be removed from the catalog. This cannot be undone.
detail.noImagesYet: No product images have been added.
detail.noVariantsYet: This product does not have sellable variants yet.
detail.simpleProductHelp: One sellable product row is managed in the stock section.
detail.deleteFailed: Failed to delete product. Try again.
detail.catalogUnavailable: Catalog changes are temporarily unavailable. Try again.
detail.catalogContactSupport: Catalog changes are temporarily unavailable. Contact support.

create.optionsLoadErrorDesc: Could not load {labels}. You can still create a basic product and add options later.

table.statusUpdateFailed: Product status could not be updated. Try again.

stock.title: Stock
stock.trackDescription: Track available inventory for this product.
stock.locationDescription: Inventory at the merchant stock location.
stock.reservedHelp: Reserved stock is calculated from orders.
stock.enterWholeNumber: Enter a whole number stock quantity.
stock.variantDescription: Inventory at the merchant location for each sellable variant.
stock.inventoryHelp: Search variants, review price, and set stocked quantities.
stock.errorVariantUnsupported: This product has multiple variants. Variant-level stock management is the next stock step.
stock.errorInventoryUnavailable: Stock is not configured for this product yet.
stock.errorLocationUnavailable: Stock location is not configured for this shop.
stock.errorInvalidQuantity: Enter a whole number stock quantity.
stock.errorNotFound: This product is no longer available.
stock.errorTemporary: Stock data is temporarily unavailable. Try again.

edit.detailsDesc: Update the core product information shown to shoppers.
edit.organizationDesc: Update how this product is grouped in the catalog.
edit.mediaDesc: Upload images, pick from your library, set a cover, and reorder the gallery.
edit.title: Title
edit.handleHelp: Leave empty to generate a handle automatically.
edit.formError: Check the form and try again.

formReview.title: Title
formReview.optionsDesc: Add the attributes shoppers choose from. Each value combination becomes a variant.
formReview.valuesHelp: Press Enter or comma to add a value. Paste a comma-separated list to add many.
formReview.noOptionsYetDesc: Create a simple product, or add common option groups to generate a variant matrix.
formReview.matrixDesc: Review every sellable row. Change SKU, price, or stock only where needed.

composer.dialogDesc: Complete product details, organization, variants, and review before saving.
composer.mediaSyncWarn: Product saved, but media usage could not be synchronized.
composer.basicsDesc: Start with the information shoppers will recognize first.
composer.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the product for the storefront.
composer.mediaDesc: Upload, review, and arrange clear product photos.
composer.organizeDesc: Choose where this product appears in the catalog.
composer.pricingDesc: Set the default selling price and stocked quantity. Enable variants only when shoppers choose between options like size or color.
composer.reviewDesc: Confirm the catalog details that will be saved.
composer.defaultSellingDesc: These values apply to the product. When variants are enabled, they become the defaults for every generated row.
composer.hasVariantsDesc: Turn this on for products sold in multiple option combinations.
composer.leaveDesc: Changes you made will be lost.

validation.priceWholeNumber: Use a whole number price without decimals or symbols.
validation.stockWholeNumber: Use a whole number stock quantity.
validation.imageUrlFull: Use full image URLs that start with http:// or https://.
validation.optionValueRequired: Enter at least one option value.
validation.reviewFields: Review the product fields and try again.
validation.handleConflict: A product with this handle may already exist. Change the handle and try again.
validation.writeInvalid: This product could not be saved. Review the highlighted fields and try again.
validation.catalogUnavailable: Catalog changes are temporarily unavailable. Try again.
validation.catalogContactSupport: Catalog changes are temporarily unavailable. Contact support.
validation.saveFailed: Product could not be saved. Try again.

editErrors.handleConflict: Another product already uses that handle.
editErrors.notFound: This product is no longer available.
editErrors.backendUnavailable: The commerce backend is temporarily unavailable.
editErrors.saveFailed: Product details could not be saved. Try again.

catalogPicker.descriptionMultiple: Search the catalog and pick products or options to add.
catalogPicker.descriptionSingle: Search the catalog and pick one product.
catalogPicker.emptyDescription: Create a product first, then come back to add it here.
catalogPicker.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different name, handle, or SKU.
catalogPicker.descriptionVariants: Browse products, then pick Size, Color, and other options — not every combo at once.
catalogPicker.addedHint: Added — pick another combo if you need more
